## Hi 👋, I'm Vijay

### 💫 About Me:
🔭 I’m currently working in Centrico India.<br>💼 4+ Years of Experience in Outsystems, 5x Outsystem Certified.<br>🌱 I’m currently learning Cloud - AWS, Linux Shell Script Bash & Jave EE & Spring and also leveraging Outsystems. 
<br>📫 Reach me via mail id : vijayr7.dev@gmail.com <br>
